creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ivan Rozhuk from comment #13)

I believe "-devel" is incorrect since 4.8.3 is release version, not a beta/alpha/pre-release/etc.

So, we really have to stick with "ccache4" (at least I don't see other options acceptable considering we can't do anything with devel/ccache at the moment). I'd suggest moving your patches to devel/ccache4.
